sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88519" key="prosamilla/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσᾰμιλλάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n88519.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vie with, rival besides,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ταῖς ἑταίραις, τοῖς ὄρεσι,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:126" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.126</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
